title.zh: GitLab CVE-2020-10977 任意文件读取导致的 RCE
title.en: GitLab CVE-2020-10977 RCE via Arbitrary File Read

description.zh: GitLab 任意文件读取漏洞可导致远程代码执行，影响版本 8.5 到 12.9。
description.en: GitLab arbitrary file read vulnerability can lead to remote code execution, affecting versions 8.5 to 12.9.

content.zh: 查看 GitLab 版本：访问 /help 页面或查看 VERSION 文件。
content.en: Check GitLab version: visit /help page or check VERSION file.

content.zh: 环境搭建：使用 Docker 启动 GitLab EE 12.8.7
content.en: Environment setup: Start GitLab EE 12.8.7 using Docker

content.zh: 利用任意文件读取漏洞读取敏感文件
content.en: Exploit arbitrary file read vulnerability to read sensitive files

content.zh: 成功读取 /etc/passwd 等敏感文件，进一步可导致 RCE。
content.en: Successfully read sensitive files like /etc/passwd, can further lead to RCE.
